workflow.name: News To Web Basic
workflow.description: Lay bai viet moi nhat, viet lai, tao anh, dang len website.

nodes.name: fetch_news
nodes.promptTemplate: Doc noi dung bai viet tu URL: {input.newsUrl}

nodes.name: rewrite_content
nodes.promptTemplate: Viet lai bai viet sau theo phong cach thuong hieu, ngan gon va ro rang. Noi dung goc: {nodes.fetch_news.content}

nodes.name: generate_image_prompt
nodes.promptTemplate: Tao prompt tao anh phu hop voi bai viet sau: {nodes.rewrite_content.content}

nodes.name: publish_post
nodes.promptTemplate: Dang bai len website voi title, content, image_prompt. title={input.title}, content={nodes.rewrite_content.content}, imagePrompt={nodes.generate_image_prompt.content}
